description_long: This is a dense urban block featuring several multi-story apartment buildings of varying heights and architectural styles, arranged closely together along a narrow street. The facades display a mix of materials, including brick, concrete, and glass, with some buildings featuring rooftop gardens and terraces. The street level is lined with trees, parked cars, and small green spaces, adding a touch of nature to the urban environment. Windows are arranged in regular, grid-like patterns, and the buildings have flat roofs, some of which are accessible and furnished with seating or plants. The overall scene is vibrant and realistic, capturing the feel of a modern city neighborhood. The buildings are tightly packed, maximizing space and creating a bustling, lived-in atmosphere.
description: A cluster of modern apartment buildings with brick, glass, and concrete facades, featuring rooftop gardens, regular window patterns, and street-level greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades of several apartment buildings, with visible street, trees, and parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, narrow street, and additional greenery on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, rooftop gardens, and a large green lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tallest building's stepped design and the compact arrangement of the block.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in regular, vertical and horizontal grids, with consistent spacing and alignment across each building facade.
